steps.title: Split the group into two parts
steps.content: The first $30$ people cost $24$ dollars each. The remaining $n-30$ people cost $16$ dollars each.

steps.title: Check with the minimum group size
steps.content: When $n=30$, the charge should be $30\cdot 24=720$. The correct answer gives $16(30)+240=720$, so it preserves the cost for the first $30$ people.
